sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports frequent infections, particularly respiratory and abdominal, and a history of lingering colds. He denies diarrhea or fever. He also reports no family history of immune deficiencies. He states he recently traveled to Zambia.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals regular heart rate and rhythm, clear lung sounds, and no palpable lymphadenopathy. Abdominal exam is soft with no tenderness upon palpation. Vital signs are within normal limits.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's frequent infections and low immunoglobulin A level suggest an underlying immunodeficiency. Further investigation is warranted to rule out other immune deficiencies.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order additional blood work including antibody panel to evaluate for other immune deficiencies. Schedule follow-up in 4 weeks to assess response to treatment and monitor for any worsening symptoms. Advise patient to inform healthcare providers of his iga deficiency prior to any blood product administration.
